{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Karoshan mage
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|In a previous [[life]], the narrator was crushed alive by a [[Karoshan mage]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A [[Karoshan mage]] is present in the class, wearing a purple mantle.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24">''The Knight'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
